headline: JPMorgan’s 6% AutoZone Stake Highlights Evolving Institutional Ownership Story
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has disclosed a passive stake of over 6% in AutoZone (NYSE:AZO). The position was reported as of March 31, 2026, in a Schedule 13G filing. This level of institutional ownership represents a meaningful shift in the shareholder base of AutoZone. AutoZone, a major retailer and distributor of automotive replacement parts and accessories, sits at the intersection of consumer spending, vehicle maintenance habits, and the aging car fleet.
